zh.lifeSummary: 當Bridget Marcy “Mary” Halsnoth於1580年出生在英國艾可可爾斯特時，她的父親Reverend Adam Halsnoth26歲，母親Mercy Marcy24歲。她於1610年之前與John Blake Pope II在英國英格蘭布里斯托結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1674年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯普萊姆斯享年94歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bridget Marcy “Mary” Halsnoth于1580年出生在英国艾可可爾斯特时，她的父亲Reverend Adam Halsnoth26岁，母亲Mercy Marcy24岁。她于1610年之前与John Blake Pope II在英国英格兰布里斯托结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1674年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯普萊姆斯享年94岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Bridget
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Gaelic Brighid (pronounced ‘breed’); . This was the name of an ancient Celtic goddess, which in Gaulish would have been Brigindos, meaning ‘the exalted one’. St Brigid of Kildare ( c.450– c.525 ) is one of the patron saints of Ireland. Very few facts are known about her life. She founded a religious house for women at Kildare, and is said to be have been buried at Downpatrick, where St Patrick and St Columba were also buried. Many of the stories of miracles told about St Brigid seem to be Christianized versions of pagan legends concerning the goddess. The popularity of the name was further reinforced throughout Europe, especially in Scandinavia in the form Birgit , as the name of the patron saint of Sweden ( 1304–73 ). She was a noblewoman of Irish stock who, after the death of her husband, founded an order of nuns, the Bridgettines. Later she went to Rome and attempted to introduce religious reforms there.

variants.name: Bridgid
meanings: Anglicized form of Gaelic Brighid (pronounced ‘breed’); . This was the name of an ancient Celtic goddess, which in Gaulish would have been Brigindos, meaning ‘the exalted one’. St Brigid of Kildare ( c.450– c.525 ) is one of the patron saints of Ireland. Very few facts are known about her life. She founded a religious house for women at Kildare, and is said to be have been buried at Downpatrick, where St Patrick and St Columba were also buried. Many of the stories of miracles told about St Brigid seem to be Christianized versions of pagan legends concerning the goddess. The popularity of the name was further reinforced throughout Europe, especially in Scandinavia in the form Birgit , as the name of the patron saint of Sweden ( 1304–73 ). She was a noblewoman of Irish stock who, after the death of her husband, founded an order of nuns, the Bridgettines. Later she went to Rome and attempted to introduce religious reforms there.

St Brigid of Kildare ( c.450– c.525 ) is one of the patron saints of Ireland. Very few facts are known about her life. She founded a religious house for women at Kildare, and is said to be have been buried at Downpatrick, where St Patrick and St Columba were also buried. Many of the stories of miracles told about St Brigid seem to be Christianized versions of pagan legends concerning the goddess. The popularity of the name was further reinforced throughout Europe, especially in Scandinavia in the form Birgit , as the name of the patron saint of Sweden ( 1304–73 ). She was a noblewoman of Irish stock who, after the death of her husband, founded an order of nuns, the Bridgettines. Later she went to Rome and attempted to introduce religious reforms there.

variants.name: Brigid
meanings: Traditional name meaning ‘the exalted one’. See Bridget .

variants.name: Brigit
meanings: Traditional name meaning ‘the exalted one’. See Bridget .

variants.name: Brighid
meanings: Traditional name meaning ‘the exalted one’. See Bridget .

nameMeanings.name: Marcy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Often used as a feminine equivalent of Mark , but in fact a feminine form of Marcius, itself a derivative of Marcus . One St Marcia is commemorated in a group with Felix, Luciolus, Fortunatus, and others; another with Zenais, Cyria, and Valeria; and a third with Ariston, Crescentian, Eutychian, Urban, Vitalis, Justus, Felicissimus, Felix, and Symphorosa. None is individually very famous.

variants.name: Marsha
meanings: Phonetic spelling of   Marcia  , associated particularly with the American film star  Marsha Hunt  (  b. 1917 ).

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Bridget Marcy “Mary” Halsnoth was born in 1580, in Colchester, Essex, England, her father, Reverend Adam Halsnoth, was 26 and her mother, Mercy Marcy, was 24. She married John Blake Pope II before 1610, in Bristol, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1674, in Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 94, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bridget Marcy “Mary” Halsnoth est née en 1580, à Colchester, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Reverend Adam Halsnoth, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mercy Marcy, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé John Blake Pope II avant 1610, à Bristol, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1674, à Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 94 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre.

Sie hat vor 1610 in Bristol, England, United Kingdom John Blake Pope II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1674 im Alter von 94 Jahren in Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bridget Marcy “Mary” Halsnoth è nata il nel 1580 nel Colchester, Essex, England, sua padre, Reverend Adam Halsnoth, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Mercy Marcy, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato John Blake Pope II prima del 1610, nel Bristol, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1674, nel Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 94 anni, e fu sepolta a England.

ko.lifeSummary: Bridget Marcy “Mary” Halsnoth(이)가 1580년 영국 에세스 코체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Reverend Adam Halsnoth(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mercy Marcy(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1610년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 브리스톨에서 John Blake Pope II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1674년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 플림우스에서 94세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bridget Marcy “Mary” Halsnoth nasceu em 1580, em Colchester, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Reverend Adam Halsnoth, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mercy Marcy, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com John Blake Pope II antes 1610, em Bristol, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1674, em Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 94 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bridget Marcy “Mary” Halsnoth родилась в 1580 г. в местности колчестир, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Reverend Adam Halsnoth было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mercy Marcy, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Blake Pope II перед 1610 г. в местности бристол, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1674 г. в местности плимоут, плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 94 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bridget Marcy “Mary” Halsnoth nació en 1580, en Colchester, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Reverend Adam Halsnoth, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mercy Marcy, tenía 24 años. Se casó con John Blake Pope II antes de 1610, en Bristol, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1674, en Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 94 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra.
